questionHtml: Using Table 3, calculate the rate of inflation in 2017 and in 2018.
markschemeHtml:
2017: 174.2−176.3176.3 × 100 = −1.19 %

2018: 172.9−174.2174.2 × 100 = −0.75 %

Award [1] for each correct answer.

No workings are necessary. The % sign is not necessary.

meta.title: Using Table 3, calculate the rate of inflation in 2017 and in 2018.
